command_summary: pi 0.80.3 isolated with --no-extensions --no-context-files, read-only tools, deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro, high thinking, explicit installed design-craft 0.5.0, and the exact benchmark prompt; final response normalized only for trailing whitespace

style_authority.note: Preserved calm repeated-use motion and direct-manipulation causality.

reference_selection.note: Used motion-quality, interaction-physics, product, and validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejected transition-all, ease-in settlement, input locking, and decorative motion.

evidence_level.note: Labeled the review static-source-only without claiming smoothness, layout thrash, or device feel as observed.

verified_boundary.note: Separated block-visible facts from runtime-dependent pointer, performance, and touch conclusions.

design_moves.note: Covered all requested physics moves, but the press scale and translate tracking compete for transform and the projection formula is over-specific.

scope_control.note: Stayed read-only and motion-focused, with moderate excess detail and implementation specificity.
